summary: Tested NewsAI Platform backend (9 pytest tests) and frontend (Expo web preview). All backend endpoints work: /api/stats, /api/posts (with 30s cache), /api/posts/{id}, /api/admin/queue, /api/admin/posts/{id}/approve|reject, /api/ingest. Safety gate (score>=0.95 + verified -> video_generation_pending -> verified after ~5s) verified. Content-keyed fact-check cache hit verified (report.cached=true on duplicate content). Frontend feed/verified/admin screens render, navigation to post detail and back works, filter chips work, admin queue shows 15 items with Approve/Reject buttons visible.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Cosmetic React Native Web warning from a library; not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handler in future.
Cache invalidation uses cache.set('feed:list', None, 1) which still stores a None entry for 1s — works but a true delete would be cleaner.
Ingestion loop has no max-posts cap; over long-running sessions the posts collection will grow unbounded (acceptable for demo).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable flows (feed, detail+back, verified+filters, admin screen rendered with 15 items)

seed_data_creation: Used backend's own self-seed (6 posts on startup) + triggered /api/ingest during tests; no manual seeding required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://social-intel-13.preview.emergentagent.com/api. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY active (Gemini 2.5 Flash calls visible in logs). MongoDB collections: posts, fact_reports, render_jobs. Tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_newsai.py and are idempotent (use existing seed + ingest).
